meta.document: AI Suggestion Feature Design (Claude API Integration)
meta.core_rule: LLM 자동 답변은 suggestion 형태만. 자동 발송 절대 금지. (CLAUDE.md 도메인 규칙)
meta.network: 로컬 Claude API, Tailscale VPN 경유 (CLAUDE.md 아키텍처)

section1_api_architecture.title: (1) Claude API 호출 구조 및 인증 방식

network_topology.key_principle: Frontend NEVER calls Claude API directly. All LLM calls go through Spring Boot for PII masking, logging, and rate control.

frontend_to_spring.method: JWT Bearer token (same as all other API calls)
frontend_to_spring.note: No special auth for AI endpoints. Uses existing auth system.

spring_to_claude.key_storage: Spring application.yml (encrypted) or environment variable CLAUDE_API_KEY. Never exposed to frontend.
spring_to_claude.note: Internal Tailscale IP. Not accessible from public internet.

request_flow: 1. Frontend sends: POST /api/ai/suggestion { type, ticketId, query, params }
2. Controller validates auth + RBAC (AS_ENGINEER, TEAM_LEAD, ADMIN)
3. Service loads ticket context from DB (symptom, product, customer history)
4. Service masks PII: customer name -> '김*', phone -> '****5678'
5. Service builds Claude prompt: system_prompt + context + user_query
6. ClaudeApiClient calls local Claude API via Tailscale VPN
8. Service saves to as_ai_logs (suggestion_id, input, output, model, tokens)
10. Frontend displays in AiSuggestionPanel (read-only, no auto-send)

error_handling.claude_timeout: 15 seconds timeout. Return 504 with message '분석 시간이 초과되었습니다. 다시 시도해 주세요.'
error_handling.claude_unavailable: Return 503 with message 'AI 서비스에 연결할 수 없습니다. Tailscale VPN 상태를 확인해 주세요.'
error_handling.claude_rate_limit: Return 429 with message '요청 한도에 도달했습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도해 주세요.'
error_handling.invalid_response: Log raw response, return 502 with message '분석 결과를 처리할 수 없습니다.'

SYMPTOM_ANALYSIS.description: Product model + symptom -> ranked probable causes + recommended action
SYMPTOM_ANALYSIS.system_prompt: You are an A/S diagnostic assistant for consumer electronics. Given a product model and customer-reported symptom, analyze the probable causes ranked by likelihood. For each cause, suggest the repair action. Base your analysis on common failure patterns for this product line. Respond in Korean.
SYMPTOM_ANALYSIS.context_injected: Similar past tickets (top 5 by symptom similarity from DB), product warranty status

output_format.rationale: 보증 기간 내(331일 남음), 과거 동일 증상 70%가 수리로 해결

RESPONSE_DRAFT.description: Generate customer-facing message draft based on ticket context
RESPONSE_DRAFT.system_prompt: You are a customer service writer for an electronics A/S center. Draft a message to the customer based on the ticket status and actions taken. Match the requested tone and channel format. Never include internal notes or cost details. Respond in Korean.
RESPONSE_DRAFT.context_injected: Ticket status, diagnosis, recent events, customer name (masked)

output_format.subject: A/S 접수 안내 (AS-2641)
output_format.body: 안녕하세요 김** 고객님. WE-300 좌측 이어폰 무음 증상 관련하여...

SIMILAR_CASES.description: Semantic search for similar past tickets
SIMILAR_CASES.input: { query: 'free text describing symptom or situation' }
SIMILAR_CASES.system_prompt: Given the search query, find the most relevant past A/S cases from the provided case list. Rank by relevance and explain why each case is similar. Respond in Korean.
SIMILAR_CASES.context_injected: Top 20 candidate tickets from DB (pre-filtered by product model)

CUSTOMER_BRIEFING.description: One-paragraph summary of customer's full history before a phone call
CUSTOMER_BRIEFING.system_prompt: Summarize this customer's history in one concise paragraph for an agent about to take their call. Include: purchase count, A/S history, current open tickets, communication preference, satisfaction level. Respond in Korean.
CUSTOMER_BRIEFING.context_injected: Customer profile, purchase history (last 5), A/S tickets (all), consultation logs (last 10)

output_format.summary: 김** (VIP, 가입 1년 8개월) 고객은 총 5회 구매 중 3건 A/S 이력...

table.name: as_ai_logs
table.description: Every Claude API call is logged here. Immutable (INSERT only). Used for usage analytics, adoption tracking, and audit.
ddl: CREATE TABLE as_ai_logs (
suggestion_id     BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
ticket_id         BIGINT UNSIGNED NULL COMMENT 'FK to as_tickets. NULL for CUSTOMER_BRIEFING (phone-based, not ticket-based)',
suggestion_type   ENUM('SYMPTOM_ANALYSIS','RESPONSE_DRAFT','SIMILAR_CASES','CUSTOMER_BRIEFING') NOT NULL,
requested_by      BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK to users (who clicked the AI button)',
requested_by_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
requested_by_role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
-- Input (what was sent to Claude, AFTER PII masking)
input_params      JSON NOT NULL COMMENT 'Masked input parameters sent to Claude',
system_prompt_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT 'SHA-256 of system prompt used (for version tracking)',
-- Output (what Claude returned)
output_content    JSON NOT NULL COMMENT 'Parsed structured response from Claude',
raw_response      TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Raw Claude API response body (for debugging, can be purged after 90 days)',
-- Model & usage
model_id          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514' COMMENT 'Claude model used',
input_tokens      INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
output_tokens     INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
latency_ms        INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Round-trip time to Claude API',
-- Adoption tracking
adopted           BOOLEAN NULL COMMENT 'NULL=not yet decided, TRUE=adopted, FALSE=dismissed',
adopted_at        DATETIME NULL,
adopted_action    VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT 'What action was taken with this suggestion (e.g., used_as_email, applied_diagnosis)',
edited_before_use BOOLEAN NULL COMMENT 'TRUE if user edited the suggestion before using it',
-- Timestamps
created_at        DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
-- Indexes
INDEX idx_ailog_ticket (ticket_id, created_at),
INDEX idx_ailog_type (suggestion_type, created_at),
INDEX idx_ailog_user (requested_by, created_at),
INDEX idx_ailog_adopted (adopted, suggestion_type),
-- Foreign keys
CONSTRAINT fk_ailog_ticket FOREIGN KEY (ticket_id) REFERENCES as_tickets(ticket_id),
CONSTRAINT fk_ailog_user FOREIGN KEY (requested_by) REFERENCES users(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

column_details.ticket_id: NULL when type=CUSTOMER_BRIEFING (phone lookup, not ticket-scoped). Non-null for all other types.
column_details.input_params: JSON with PII already masked. Example: {"productModel":"WE-300","symptom":"좌측 무음","customerName":"김**"}
column_details.system_prompt_hash: SHA-256 hash to track prompt versioning without storing full prompt text in every row
column_details.output_content: Structured JSON matching the output_format for each suggestion_type. Parsed from Claude response.
column_details.raw_response: Full Claude API response body. For debugging. Purgeable after 90 days to save storage.
column_details.adopted: Tri-state: NULL (user saw it but hasn't acted), TRUE (used it), FALSE (dismissed). Updated via PATCH.
column_details.adopted_action: Describes HOW the suggestion was used. Values: 'applied_diagnosis', 'used_as_email', 'used_as_sms', 'copied_to_memo', 'partial_use'
column_details.edited_before_use: TRUE if user clicked 'Edit' before 'Use'. Measures how much users trust raw AI output.

companion_event.trigger: When AiSuggestionPanel is expanded or suggestion result is displayed
companion_event.debounce: 1 per suggestion per session (don't log multiple views of same suggestion)
companion_event.note: This event links ticket timeline to AI usage. The as_ai_logs table stores the full detail; the event is a lightweight pointer.

analytics_queries.adoption_rate: SELECT suggestion_type, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(adopted=TRUE) AS adopted, ROUND(SUM(adopted=TRUE)/COUNT(*)*100,1) AS rate FROM as_ai_logs WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY suggestion_type
analytics_queries.avg_latency: SELECT suggestion_type, ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)) AS avg_ms FROM as_ai_logs GROUP BY suggestion_type
analytics_queries.edit_rate: SELECT suggestion_type, ROUND(SUM(edited_before_use=TRUE)/SUM(adopted=TRUE)*100,1) AS edit_rate FROM as_ai_logs WHERE adopted=TRUE GROUP BY suggestion_type
analytics_queries.per_user_usage: SELECT requested_by_name, COUNT(*) AS calls, SUM(adopted=TRUE) AS adopted FROM as_ai_logs WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY requested_by

ticket_detail_page.trigger: Panel expand or explicit 'AI 분석' button click

ai_support_page.component: AiSupportPage (4 cards, each for one suggestion type)
ai_support_page.trigger: Click 'Start Analysis' button on each card

customer_page.trigger: Click button next to customer name

AiSuggestionPanel.description: Collapsible right-side panel on ticket detail page
AiSuggestionPanel.location: Below DiagnosisCard in TicketDetailPage right column

design.collapsed: Gradient border card with title '🤖 AI 의사결정 서포트' + 'Claude · 권고 (자동 발송 X)' badge
design.expanded: Shows suggestion type tabs + results + action buttons

display: Ranked cause list (rank, cause, probability %, action, avgDays)
Probability bar chart (horizontal, colored by rank)
Note box: '⚠ AI 추천은 참고용. 최종 결정은 담당자가 합니다.'

actions.label: 추천 적용
actions.behavior: Set diagnosisResult + resolutionPlan from AI recommendation. Mark adopted=TRUE, adopted_action='applied_diagnosis'

actions.label: 다시 분석
actions.behavior: Re-call API with same inputs. New suggestion_id.

display: Draft text in styled card (background #F8FAFC, 12px, line-height 1.6)

actions.label: 📧 이메일로 사용
actions.behavior: Open email compose modal with draft pre-filled. Mark adopted_action='used_as_email'

actions.label: 📱 SMS로 사용
actions.behavior: Open SMS compose with draft. Mark adopted_action='used_as_sms'

actions.label: ✏ 편집
actions.behavior: Open editable textarea. On save, mark edited_before_use=TRUE

ResponseDraftResult.safety_banner: ⚠ 자동 발송 절대 금지. 반드시 내용 검토 후 수동 발송하세요.

display: Table: ticketNo, similarity %, resolution summary, days to resolve

actions.label: 상세 보기
actions.behavior: Navigate to selected ticket detail page

SuggestionActionBar.description: Bottom bar of AiSuggestionPanel, always visible when suggestion is displayed

ui_flow_scenarios.title: A/S 담당자 증상 분석 요청 (티켓 상세에서)
steps: 4. 제품 모델(WE-300) + 증상('좌측 무음') 자동 채움됨 (티켓 데이터)
11. -> diagnosisResult 필드에 'AI 분석: 드라이버 유닛 단선 (76%)' 자동 입력

ui_flow_scenarios.title: 답변 초안 생성 -> 편집 후 이메일 발송
steps: 7. 일부 문구 수정 후 [📧 이메일로 사용] 클릭
8. -> 이메일 발송 모달 열림 (수신자: 고객 이메일, 내용: 편집된 초안)
11. -> MailLog 기록 + EMAIL_SENT 이벤트 + (첫 응답이면) FIRST_RESPONSE 이벤트

ui_flow_scenarios.title: 고객 브리핑 (전화 전 요약)
steps: 6. 하이라이트 태그: '현재 진행 중 1건', '보증 기간 내', '응답성 좋음'

ui_flow_scenarios.title: AI 서포트 전용 페이지 사용
steps: 2. KPI 확인: 금일 호출 142, 채택률 78%, 평균 응답 1.4초, 학습 케이스 40,213
3. '제품 증상 분석' 카드에서 제품 선택 + 증상 직접 입력
4. [🤖 분석 시작] 클릭 -> POST /api/ai/suggestion { type:'SYMPTOM_ANALYSIS', params:{...} }
5. 결과 표시 (독립 분석, 특정 티켓 연결 없음)
6. 하단 호출 이력 테이블에 새 행 추가: 시각, 유형, 대상, 호출자, 채택 여부

feedback_buttons.note: Optional. User can close panel without clicking either button (adopted stays NULL).

auto_adoption_detection.description: In some cases, adoption is detected automatically without explicit button click

rules.trigger: User clicks '📧 이메일로 사용' on ResponseDraft
User clicks '📱 SMS로 사용' on ResponseDraft

ui_level: All suggestion results display: '⚠ AI 추천은 참고용. 최종 결정은 담당자가 합니다. 자동 발송 절대 금지.'
Response drafts have separate safety banner: '⚠ 자동 발송 절대 금지. 반드시 내용 검토 후 수동 발송하세요.'
There is NO 'send directly' button. Only 'use as email/SMS' which opens compose modal for review.
AiSuggestionPanel badge always shows '권고 (자동 발송 X)'
backend_level: Claude API is never called from frontend directly
PII is masked before sending to Claude
All calls logged to as_ai_logs (audit trail)
No auto-trigger: AI is only called when user explicitly clicks a button

rules: 모든 출력은 suggestion — 시스템이 직접 발송하지 않음
고객 PII는 마스킹 후 전송 (이름은 성만, 전화는 끝 4자리)
로컬 Claude API 사용, 외부 인터넷으로 전송 없음 (Tailscale VPN)
호출 이력 전수 기록 — 누가 언제 무엇을 받았고 채택했는지 감사 가능
가격 결정 / 보상 결정 등 비용 관련 자동화 금지
고객 클레임 대응 자동 발송 금지

api_endpoints.params: page, size, type?, requestedBy?, adopted?, from?, to?
